CheckTitle: RDS Parameter Group events are subscribed.をチェックします
Description: Amazon RDS event notification subscriptionsが有効です for データベース parameter groups events.を確認します
Risk: Amazon RDS イベントサブスクリプションs for データベース parameter groups are designed to provide incident notification of events that may affect the security, availability, and reliability of the RDS データベース instances associated with these parameter groups.

Recommendation.Text: To subscribe to RDS インスタンス event notifications, see Subscribing to Amazon RDS event notification in the Amazon RDS User Guide.
